channel.title: SaaS auf Nicky Reinert
channel.description: Blog & projects by Nicky Reinert (Institute for Digital Challenges): web development & software development, SEO & analytics, hosting & DevOps, WordPress & Hugo, tools & projects, data protection & digital culture — plus content on AI and autism & society.

item.title: Numbers, please — about anthropic
item.description: 1/300 - ratio of support staff to users in traditional SaaS companies B2B [1] 1/3000 - max ratio of support staff to users in traditional SaaS companies B2C [2] 30 Bn - annual revenue of Anthropic [3] 5000 - number of employees at Anthropic [4] 18 - 30 million - monthly active users at Anthropic …
item.dc:subject: Lesezeit: 1 Minuten
